capabilities.title: Durable Final Text
capabilities.baselineExpectation: final assistant text can be rendered, sent, receipted, and committed through the shared message-channel path

capabilities.title: Durable Final Media
capabilities.baselineExpectation: generated media can be rendered, sent, receipted, and committed through the shared message-channel path

capabilities.title: Durable Final Payload
capabilities.baselineExpectation: reply payloads can be rendered into channel sends without losing text, media, or presentation data

capabilities.title: Durable Final Silent Delivery
capabilities.baselineExpectation: silent delivery intent is carried through durable final send requirements and adapter context

capabilities.title: Durable Final Reply Target
capabilities.baselineExpectation: reply target intent is carried through durable final send requirements and adapter context

capabilities.title: Durable Final Thread Target
capabilities.baselineExpectation: thread target intent is carried through durable final send requirements and adapter context

capabilities.title: Durable Final Native Quote
capabilities.baselineExpectation: native quote intent can be represented as a declared durable final capability and proven by adapters that support it

capabilities.title: Durable Final Message Sending Hooks
capabilities.baselineExpectation: message sending hooks run around durable final sends without losing attempt context

capabilities.title: Durable Final Batch
capabilities.baselineExpectation: multi-part durable final payloads preserve ordering and receipts

capabilities.title: Durable Final Unknown Send Reconciliation
capabilities.baselineExpectation: ambiguous durable send outcomes can be reconciled without duplicate or lost final delivery

capabilities.title: Durable Final After Send Success Hook
capabilities.baselineExpectation: after-send-success lifecycle hooks run after successful platform send attempts

capabilities.title: Durable Final After Commit Hook
capabilities.baselineExpectation: after-commit lifecycle hooks run after durable final receipts are committed

capabilities.title: Live Draft Preview
capabilities.baselineExpectation: draft preview state can be declared and proven through the shared live message adapter contract

capabilities.title: Live Preview Finalization
capabilities.baselineExpectation: preview state can transition to final delivery through the shared live message adapter contract

capabilities.title: Live Progress Updates
capabilities.baselineExpectation: progress updates can be represented and proven through the shared live message adapter contract

capabilities.title: Live Native Streaming
capabilities.baselineExpectation: native streaming can be declared and proven by adapters that support streaming updates

capabilities.title: Live Quiet Finalization
capabilities.baselineExpectation: quiet finalization can be declared and proven by adapters that suppress noisy final updates

capabilities.title: Live Final Edit
capabilities.baselineExpectation: live preview finalizers can edit an existing preview into the final message

capabilities.title: Live Normal Fallback
capabilities.baselineExpectation: live preview finalizers can fall back to a normal final send when edit finalization is unavailable

capabilities.title: Live Discard Pending
capabilities.baselineExpectation: live preview finalizers can discard pending preview state when final delivery should not reuse it

capabilities.title: Live Preview Receipt
capabilities.baselineExpectation: live preview finalizers can carry preview receipts into finalization

capabilities.title: Live Retain On Ambiguous Failure
capabilities.baselineExpectation: live preview finalizers can retain preview state when finalization fails ambiguously

capabilities.title: Ack After Receive Record
capabilities.baselineExpectation: receive acknowledgement can run after the inbound message is recorded

capabilities.title: Ack After Agent Dispatch
capabilities.baselineExpectation: receive acknowledgement can run after the inbound message is dispatched to the agent path

capabilities.title: Ack After Durable Send
capabilities.baselineExpectation: receive acknowledgement can run after durable outbound response send

capabilities.title: Manual Ack
capabilities.baselineExpectation: manual receive acknowledgement can be declared as plugin-owned behavior and proven by the adapter
